Off Calendar Jan-19-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
HEARING RE: DEFENDANT WENDY MILLER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

No appearances. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Off calendar. Defendant failed to file and serve the motion in compliance with CCP 437c(a)(2). (Robinson v. Woods (2008) 168 Cal.App.4th 1258, 1262 ["trial courts do not have authority to shorten the minimum notice period for summary judgment hearings."].)

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported/No For The Record. (302/RCE)
